title: feat(cognitive-debt): add offline debt detection and management pipeline
summary:
Introduces git-native cognitive debt tracking with zero LLM/network
  dependency. All signals derived from git objects only.

  New commands:
  - `audit` — walks commits, scores friction, writes to cognitive-debt/v1
    orphan branch (sharded JSON, Entire-style layout)
  - `endorse <sha>` — records reviewed/endorsed status on branch
  - `debt` — terminal heatmap: subsystems × friction × zombies

  New modules:
  - cognitive_debt: ActivityItem, EndorsementRecord, DebtStore (branch r/w)
  - audit: Agent-Attribution trailer parsing, keyword fallback, path-based
    classification, friction scoring (complexity delta + doc gap + author
    churn), subsystem matching, zombie detection

  Storage model: cognitive-debt/v1 orphan branch is source of truth;
  semantic.db gains activity_items + endorsements tables as local cache.

  Extends hydrate to pull activity items from branch into DB.
  Extends `enable claude` to write .git/hooks/post-commit for auto-audit.

  AI-free zone enforcement (auth/, payments/, migrations/) forces `risk`
  classification regardless of commit message content.
